roster_delta.desc: Pittsburgh Pirates signed free agent SS Ryan McCarty to a minor league contract.

Pittsburgh Pirates recalled RHP Cam Sanders from Indianapolis Indians.

Philadelphia Phillies optioned RHP Chase Shugart to Lehigh Valley IronPigs.
Cincinnati Reds activated RHP Emilio Pagán from the 15-day injured list.
Cincinnati Reds placed CF Dane Myers on the 10-day injured list. Left shoulder contusion.
Cincinnati Reds selected the contract of 2B Ivan Johnson from Louisville Bats.
Cincinnati Reds optioned RHP Zach McCambley to Louisville Bats.

Milwaukee Brewers optioned LHP Robert Gasser to ACL Brewers.
